trickyParts: Adding packages/aws-infra/ as a new bun workspace package required updating bun.lock. The initial @types/node version in package.json (^20.0.0) downgraded the workspace-wide @types/node from 25.5.0 to 20.x, breaking daemon typecheck. Fixed by removing @types/node from aws-infra devDependencies entirely.

The packages/aws-infra/ is a new Pulumi project for brownfield adoption — uses Pulumi import option to adopt the existing security group rather than creating a new one. Operator must set devBoxSecurityGroupId in Pulumi.prod.yaml before first run.
No plan comments existed on issue 453 — implemented directly from issue body requirements.
deviations: No plan phase was run for this issue — implemented directly from issue body. The architect.json in .legion/ was from a previous issue that used this workspace.

The Pulumi project uses ingress:[] (empty ingress) rather than explicitly removing a specific SSH rule, since we don't know the current rule set. This is the correct declarative approach — Pulumi will reconcile to the desired state on first apply.
openQuestions: The devBoxSecurityGroupId in Pulumi.prod.yaml is set to sg-REPLACE_ME — operator must fill in the actual SG ID before running pulumi up.
The Pulumi import step (pulumi import aws:ec2/securityGroup:SecurityGroup dev-box-sg <sg-id> -s prod) must be run before the first pulumi up to adopt the existing security group.
Verification of nc -zw3 52.53.150.80 22 failing and SSM working requires actual AWS access — cannot be verified in this environment.
